## How to test

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run check` passes
- [ ] `npm run test` passes
- [ ] User-facing strings are translated in **EN, FR and DE**
- [ ] New per-country data (if any) also shows on the Atlas country page
- [ ] I checked it in the browser (and offline, if this touches the PWA)
